mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO activity_step (activity_plan_id, step_number, step_title, duration, step_type, knowledge_explanation, action_desc, guidance_speech, interaction_tips, summary, create_time, update_time, create_user, update_user) VALUES
(#{item.activityPlanId}, #{item.stepNumber}, #{item.stepTitle}, #{item.duration}, #{item.stepType}, #{item.knowledgeExplanation}, #{item.actionDesc}, #{item.guidanceSpeech}, #{item.interactionTips}, #{item.summary}, #{item.createTime}, #{item.updateTime}, #{item.createUser}, #{item.updateUser})
